name: BBL CAD Guideline Standard
description: Standard validation rules for BBL CAD drawings

rules.name: Required layers present
rules.description: Checks whether all 14 required layers per BBL CAD guideline are present

rules.name: Layer colors valid
rules.description: Checks whether the layer colors match the specifications (e.g. Layer 7 = white)

rules.name: No undefined layers
rules.description: Checks whether there are no undefined layers in the drawing

rules.name: Polylines closed
rules.description: Checks whether all room polygons are closed (start and end point identical)

rules.name: Polylines planar
rules.description: Checks whether all polylines lie on Z=0 (2D conformity)

rules.name: No self-intersections
rules.description: Checks whether room polygons do not self-intersect

rules.name: Minimum room size
rules.description: Checks whether all rooms have a minimum area of 1 m²

rules.name: Allowed entity types
rules.description: Checks whether only allowed entity types are used (LINE, POLYLINE, TEXT, etc.)

rules.name: No OLE objects
rules.description: Checks whether no embedded OLE objects are present

rules.name: Font valid
rules.description: Checks whether only the prescribed font "Arial" is used

rules.name: Text height valid
rules.description: Checks whether the text height matches the specifications (min. 2.5mm)

rules.name: AOID format valid
rules.description: Checks whether all AOIDs conform to the BBL format (e.g. "2011.DM.04.015")

rules.name: AOID unique
rules.description: Checks whether each AOID occurs only once in the drawing

rules.name: AOID in room list
rules.description: Checks whether all AOIDs are present in the uploaded Excel room list
